query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customer_external_id IS NOT NULL AND customer_external_id != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_customer,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customer_external_id IS NULL OR customer_external_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_customer,
  SUM(CASE WHEN match_status = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN match_status = 'unmatched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN match_status = 'review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as status_review
FROM services;
